testcase.name: test_fde_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration17_features.py:81: in test_fde_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"FDE login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: FDE login failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","username"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","password"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_branch_admin_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration17_features.py:93: in test_branch_admin_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Branch Admin login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Branch Admin login failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","username"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","password"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_counsellor_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration17_features.py:105: in test_counsellor_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Counsellor login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Counsellor login failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","username"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","password"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
